project_context.domain: CRM, Sales Dashboard, Mobile Sales Workflow

fonts.import_instructions: Add to index.html or import via @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600&family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

layout_and_spacing.sales_mobile: Mobile-first layout. Use 100vw width constraints for mobile flow logic, stack elements vertically. Generous touch targets (min 44px height).
layout_and_spacing.admin_desktop: Data-dense control room. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Strict borders, minimal padding inside tables (px-4 py-2) to maximize data visibility.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Cardless or 1px border. No soft drop shadows. E1 Rule: Expose the skeleton, use border-collapse where possible.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strictly Left-aligned. Never center-align forms, lists, or headers.

components.buttons: Square or rounded-md. Hard contrasts. Primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white. Secondary: bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-900.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form primitives. Inputs must have clear borders. No native <select> or date inputs; use Shadcn Select and Calendar.
components.tables: For Admin: Shadcn Table. Strict borders on rows. Header rows use gray-50 background.
components.tabs: For Follow-up screen. Clean underline tabs, not pill shaped. Use Shadcn Tabs.

testing.rule: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows acting as links) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React (.js files, not .tsx). Use standard Tailwind CSS.
Implement a Mobile-first view for the Sales roles: Sales Dashboard, Lead List, Add Lead form, Lead Details, Post Call form, and Follow-up screens. Ensure sticky bottom or top nav for mobile feel.
Implement a Data-Dense Desktop view for Admin roles: Dashboard metrics, Leads table, Call sessions, Recordings (with audio playback UI), and Performance grids.
Use Shadcn UI for structured components. Customize Shadcn spacing to fit the Archetype 4 'Swiss' layout (tight, sharp, flat).
Never use generic placeholder text; implement empty states with gray icons and descriptive text.
Manage role-based routing natively: simulate login state that directs user to '/sales' or '/admin' trees.
Include hover states (e.g., hover:bg-gray-100) and focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black) for accessibility.
